name: Count Master Rush
description: Count Masters: Stickman Games About this game Choose the best gate, pass through it, and bring stickman warriors together to clash with the opposing crowd. Become the crowd master and lead your people through the crowded city till the end of this epic race. Crash obstacles and beat everyone on your way, collect coins and upgrade your levels. Defeat the King-stickman in the final battle and take the castle! Looking for some fun and thrill? Then this 3d running game is just for you. Count Masters Rush is one of the most exciting clash games of all times! You start the battle alone but trust us: there are no chances for you to feel lonely.
instructions: Tap and Hold left mouse button amp drag for left right
